demo.title: Deploy a V4 burn reactor for any token on Robinhood Chain
demo.code:
deploy the reactor factory on Robinhood, then stamp a reactor for $SHILLWOOD

-> 1. Deploy RHReactorFactory (one-time, ~800k gas)
   2. Call createReactor(shillwoodAddress) — emits ReactorCreated, ~3.5M gas
   3. Call acceptAdmin() on the new reactor to take admin
   Factory registry: reactorOf(token) -> reactor address forever

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured and wallet funded on Robinhood Chain (chain 4663)
Deploy the factory first using references/deploy-data.md (paste bytecode + encoded constructor args)
Save the factory address — you will need it for every createReactor call
After createReactor, call acceptAdmin() on the returned reactor address to claim admin
